title: lyonia elliptica
intro: Lyonia elliptica, also known as the fringe tree, is a flowering plant native to the eastern United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Lyonia elliptica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
